# 2025-12-11 — Thursday

Clear morning. Ran along the avenida.

Refactored numpy. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Refactored pydantic. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Worked on the xcodebuild pass. 0.8 is the right knob; 0.85 over-merged, 0.9 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Wrote a test that failed for the right reason. Rare enough to note.

Ran into Inês at Belém. First time in months. Agreed to dinner next week; we'll see.

Tried the new bakery on Bairro Alto. The pastel was underbaked.

Most of my bad code is written while trying to prove I was right earlier.

Shipping fast only feels good if the rollback is also fast. That's all.
